creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Lapo Luchini from comment #10)
> On the other hand, while it is built from the same repo, it seems that
> upstream they're using a different versioning.
Yeah, that was the thing I stumbled upon which made the logs ports not quite fit as the slave for the main VictoriaMetrics port, and didn't figure how to deal with this discrepancy.  Eventually, someone else stepped in and created the independent port (as of commit ports 52e5fa8e7955), so I guess we can close this PR.
